title: Norwegian Brown Pasta Bake
description: A hearty and flavorful pasta bake with Norwegian brown cheese and golden breadcrumbs. A great comfort food for any occasion.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the garlic and onion and cook until softened.
Add the Norwegian brown cheese to the skillet and stir until melted.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with golden breadcrumbs.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until the breadcrumbs are golden brown.
